title: Golden Age of the Sith
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the time period|the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] story arc, [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith|''The Golden Age of the Sith'']]|linebreak=1}}
{{Citation}}
{{Quote|…Our Sith Empire is great, and rich, and powerful… this is our Golden Age.|Marka Ragnos|<ref name="Golden Age of the Sith">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 2]]</ref>}}
[[File:SternNaga.jpg|thumb|180px|Sith Lord Naga Sadow, potential Dark Lord]]
The '''Golden Age of the Sith''' was a period of relative stability and power within the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Old Sith Empire]]. When [[Marka Ragnos]], a powerful and long-lived [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] died after having ruled for a century, a power vacuum was created within the Empire's leadership. Two [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]], [[Ludo Kressh]] and the level-headed and intelligent [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]] began to amass power for their respective attempts to take the throne for themselves. Sadow's play for power involved the unexpected arrival of the [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] explorers [[Gav Daragon|Gav]] and [[Jori Daragon]]; after releasing Jori, who would inadvertently lead the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] to the Republic, Sadow would whip the rest of the Empire up into a frenzy to attack the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in order to prevent the Empire from entering a period of stagnation and decay.

[[File:SternLudo.jpg|thumb|left|170px|The aspiring [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Ludo Kressh]].]]
However, the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]] would not go to plan, as the Republic, aided by Jori and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] proved stronger than the Sith had anticipated. Though Sadow's forces laid siege to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] itself, the Republic, led by the Jedi and [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Teta/Legends|Teta's]] forces, would rally to push back their enemies, eventually causing Sadow to flee to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. So soon after the height of its Golden Age, the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Empire was no more.

A [[4000 BBY/Legends|millennium later]], [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] led an attempt of his own to establish a Second Golden Age during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Kun, like Sadow before him, was eventually defeated by the combined weight of the Jedi and the Republic; he would become trapped within the monuments he had created for himself on Yavin 4 for nearly four millennia before being vanquished by the [[Padawan/Legends|apprentices]] of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi academy]]. 

The [[Muur Talisman]] dated from this era.<ref name="leg30">[[Legacy (2006) 30|''Legacy'' (2006) 30]]</ref>
